title.rendered: 23 Digital Marketing & Fundraising Reports for Nonprofits Worldwide

content.rendered:
The reports listed below offer much-needed data to help your nonprofit craft its 2022-23 digital marketing and fundraising strategy. If you would like to suggest a report be added to the list, please contact Heather Mansfield. Thank you!

For Nonprofits in the United States:

1. Benchmarks Study 2022 :: Download
Published by M+R

2.  State of Modern Philanthropy 2022 :: Download
Published by Classy

3. Charitable Giving Report 2022 :: Download
Published by the Blackbaud Institute

4. Nonprofit Marketing + Fundraising Trends for 2022 :: Download
Published by HubSpot

6. Nonprofit Acceleration Report 2022 :: Download
Published by Community Boost

7. 2022 Nonprofit Communications Trends Report :: Download
Published by Nonprofit Marketing Guide

8. Women Give 2022: Racial Justice, Gender and Generosity :: Download
Published by the Lilly Family School of Philanthropy

9. Quarterly Fundraising Effectiveness Report :: Download
Published by the Association of Fundraising Professionals

For Nonprofits in Canada:

1. The Giving Report 2022 :: Download
Published by CanadaHelps

2. 2020 Multicultural & Newcomer Charitable Giving Study :: Download
Published by Imagine Canada

For Nonprofits in Africa:

1. 2020 Growing Giving in Kenya, Uganda, and Tanzania Report :: Download
Published by the Charities Aid Foundation

2. South Africa Giving 2019 :: Download
Published by the Charities Aid Foundation

For Nonprofits in Asia Pacific:

1. 2022 Australian Communities Report :: Download
Published by Australian Communities

2. Everyday Giving in India Report 2019 :: Download
Published by Sattva

For Nonprofits in Europe:

1. Charity Digital Skills Report 2022 :: Download
Published by Skills Platform

2. Facebook Fundraising Benchmark Report 2022 :: Download
Published by GivePanel

3. Benchmarks UK Study 2021 :: Download
Published by M+R

4. 2020 Global Trends in Giving Report Focus Italia :: Scarica il report
Pubblicato da Italia non profit

For Nonprofits in Latin America:

1. 2019 Informe Global sobre Tecnología de ONG :: Descargar
Publicado por Nonprofit Tech for Good & Funraise

For Nonprofits Worldwide:

1. 2022 Nonprofit Trends Report :: Download
Published by Salesforce

2. 2021 Nonprofit Video Index :: Download
Published by Tectonic Video

3. 2020 Global Trends in Giving Report :: Download
Published by Nonprofit Tech for Good & Funraise

4. The 2020 Global Online Fundraising Scorecard :: Download
Published by Salesforce & NextAfter

5. 2019 Global NGO Technology Report :: Download
Published by Nonprofit Tech for Good & Funraise

6. 2019 World Giving Index :: Download
Published by the Charities Aid Foundation

Our Certificate in Social Media Marketing & Fundraising program covers the fundamentals of social media marketing and fundraising for your nonprofit. Participants will learn how to create a social media strategy, how to craft a content marketing plan, and current best practices for using social media for community engagement and fundraising.

The program requires the completion of three webinars and costs $100 USD. To earn the 2024 certificate, you can attend the webinars live or view the recordings – or a combination of both. Learn more & register!
